Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Assignment as a step in the process flow
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is directly preceded by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Frequency of activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that leads to reviewer assignment activities (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers) within 7 days
Metric: the average of the function base < 7 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Assignment appears exactly once
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that eventually result in SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Frequency of activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Average number of days between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment per case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that involve at least one occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Frequency of activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that occurs before any plagiarism-related activity (e.g., Plagiarism Originality Report Completed)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is followed by a delay-indicating activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in revised manuscript trajectories (i.e., cases containing Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: Frequency of activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' for cases where activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that appears in the first half of a case’s lifecycle
Metric: the average of the function base < 0.5 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of distinct cases containing SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is not followed by any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences that are part of variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'", 'metric_condition': '> median', 'aggregation': 'percentage'}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is eventually succeeded by an EIC decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision'"}"
